title: piper caninum var. thwaitesii
intro: Piper caninum var. thwaitesii, also known as Indian long pepper, is a variety of Piper caninum, a type of flowering plant in the pepper family (Piperaceae). This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Indian long pepper include relief from digestive issues, reduced inflammation, and improved respiratory health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
